## Testing

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `black --check .`
- [ ] `mypy app`
- [ ] `pytest`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to the story or task.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where API, architecture, or operations changed.
- [ ] Logs avoid document contents and sensitive data.
- [ ] Benchmark impact was recorded for comparison engine changes.
